AcceptConnection.description: Grants permission to accept a connection

AssociateAutomationUnitRole.description: Grants permission to associate an IAM role to an automation unit

AssociateCreatedArtifact.description: Grants permission to associate a given AWS artifact to a MigrationTask

AssociateDiscoveredResource.description: Grants permission to associate a given ADS resource to a MigrationTask

AssociateSourceResource.description: Grants permission to associate source resource

BatchAssociateIamRoleWithConnection.description: Grants permission to batch-associate IAM roles with a connection

BatchDisassociateIamRoleFromConnection.description: Grants permission to batch-disassociate IAM roles from a connection

CreateAutomationRun.description: Grants permission to create an automation unit run

CreateAutomationUnit.description: Grants permission to create an automation unit

CreateHomeRegionControl.description: Grants permission to create a Migration Hub Home Region Control

CreateProgressUpdateStream.description: Grants permission to create a ProgressUpdateStream

DeleteAutomationRun.description: Grants permission to delete an automation unit run

DeleteAutomationUnit.description: Grants permission to delete an automation unit

DeleteConnection.description: Grants permission to delete a connection

DeleteHomeRegionControl.description: Grants permission to delete a Migration Hub Home Region Control

DeleteProgressUpdateStream.description: Grants permission to delete a ProgressUpdateStream

DescribeApplicationState.description: Grants permission to get an Application Discovery Service Application's state

DescribeAutomationRun.description: Grants permission to describe an automation unit run

DescribeAutomationUnit.description: Grants permission to describe an automation unit

DescribeHomeRegionControls.description: Grants permission to list Home Region Controls

DescribeMigrationTask.description: Grants permission to describe a MigrationTask

DisassociateAutomationUnitRole.description: Grants permission to disassociate an IAM role from an automation unit

DisassociateCreatedArtifact.description: Grants permission to disassociate a given AWS artifact from a MigrationTask

DisassociateDiscoveredResource.description: Grants permission to disassociate a given ADS resource from a MigrationTask

DisassociateSourceResource.description: Grants permission to diassociate source resource

GetConnection.description: Grants permission to get a connection

GetHomeRegion.description: Grants permission to get the Migration Hub Home Region

ImportMigrationTask.description: Grants permission to import a MigrationTask

ListApplicationStates.description: Grants permission to list Application statuses

ListAutomationRuns.description: Grants permission to list automation unit runs

ListAutomationUnits.description: Grants permission to list automation units

ListConnectionRoles.description: Grants permission to list connection roles

ListCreatedArtifacts.description: Grants permission to list associated created artifacts for a MigrationTask

ListDiscoveredResources.description: Grants permission to list associated ADS resources from MigrationTask

ListMigrationTaskUpdates.description: Grants permission to list migration tasks updates

ListProgressUpdateStreams.description: Grants permission to to list ProgressUpdateStreams

ListSourceResources.description: Grants permission to list source resources

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

NotifyApplicationState.description: Grants permission to update an Application Discovery Service Application's state

NotifyMigrationTaskState.description: Grants permission to notify latest MigrationTask state

RejectConnection.description: Grants permission to reject a connection

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access based on the tag keys that are passed in the request
